rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>My, my!<unk[5:0]> We meet again. How goes your
journey? Wonderfully, I hope?

This is normally where I'd give you a
chance to respond, but I'd like to talk
about me instead.
<unk[3:0:261]>Once I was a woman without ambition. 
Sure, I had my twin loves of fashion and
travel, but I didn't have drive!
<unk[3:0:8]>But Cece's designs spoke to me.<unk[5:0]> They
said, "Meeshy, take those fascinations
and turn them into action!"
Now I'm a changed woman, chasing the
treasures of another inspired fashionista—
the <Color=red>Great Bandit<Color=white> <Color=red>Misko<Color=white>!
And as I search for <Color=red>Misko's collection<Color=white>,
I intend to spread the joy of fashion
everywhere I go. Such is my passion!

<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>We meet again! <unk[5:0]>How have you been?<unk[5:1]>
Worn anything good lately?

お<Ruby={4:6}げんき>元気でしたか？
